heading: Powers
label: 230506 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its articles of incorporation filed in the State of incorporation and in its constitution and bylaws.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)23050636:3802., , .May 23, 1986Pub. L. 99–318, § 2100 Stat. 474The words “and subject to the laws of such State” are omitted as unnecessary.
